name: OnyX
description: Multi-function system maintenance and optimization tool for macOS

extraction.note: Version is per macOS release — each macOS version has its own OnyX build. Extract the version for the latest macOS listed.

changelog.note: Lists changes per version but without dates — just bullet points

release_date.note: Date in plain text near version number (e.g. 'June 15, 2026'). No structured date. Not on release page.

notes: No Sparkle feed, no API, no XML/JSON endpoints. Pure HTML scraping only. Version is strictly coupled to macOS release — never use OnyX built for a different macOS version. App is NOT notarized (requires right-click Open). No Cloudflare protection.
